Interface IRasterCalcUniqueValues3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that controls calculation of unique values.

[Guid("4F1DB6A1-E923-46D0-897A-F858A7253D05")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IRasterCalcUniqueValues3 : IRasterCalcUniqueValues2, IRasterCalcUniqueValues

BlockSize

The calculation block size.

IPnt BlockSize { get; set; }

IPnt
